description: Add a bounded sandbox boot smoke test to the CI boot guard so devcontainer changes prove entrypoint and healthcheck behavior, not just image buildability.

userStories.title: Add a boot smoke test helper
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I need a reusable bounded helper so the workflow can wait for sandbox container health and report diagnostics on failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a script that validates a compose project/container name supplied by CI
Wait loop has a bounded timeout and recognizes healthy, unhealthy, and missing-container states
On failure, print docker compose ps, container health inspect output, and recent logs
Script always attempts compose teardown in a cleanup trap
userStories.notes: Added scripts/sandbox-boot-smoke.sh with bounded health polling, diagnostics, teardown trap, and vitest coverage on 2026-06-21.

userStories.title: Wire sandbox boot guard to exercise health
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the sandbox boot guard workflow to run the sandbox long enough to exercise entrypoint and healthcheck wiring.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/sandbox-boot-guard.yml invokes the boot smoke test after image build/config validation
The workflow uses CI-safe settings such as an isolated compose project name and SKIP_PNPM_INSTALL=1
The guard does not publish images, log in to external services, or perform release side effects
userStories.notes: Wired sandbox-boot-guard workflow to build the compose image tag, run boot smoke, and preserve no-publish/no-login side effects on 2026-06-21.
